name: Chickpea-Zucchini Curry #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a microwave-safe dish.
2. Cover and microwave for 10 minutes.
3. Add the large zucchini, sliced into large triangular wedges.
4. Continue microwaving covered for an additional 8 minutes.
5. Serve with yogurt cheese (non-fat yogurt strained for 24 hours until reduced to half its bulk) mixed in, which provides a creamy sauce.
Note: Seitan is not an authentic Indian ingredient; they would use paneer, a solid whey cheese curdled with yogurt and lemon, but seitan blends well with Indian food and has very little fat.
